sources.title: Cell cycle-related kinase is a crucial inducer of androgen receptor-mediated hepatocarcinogenesis
sources.note: The CCRK paper links hepatocarcinogenesis to beta-catenin and TCF signaling, including EGFR and CCND1.

sources.title: Molecular pathogenesis and targeted therapies for HCC
sources.note: Review articles describe GLUL, AXIN2, TBX3, and related genes as beta-catenin-responsive in HCC.

sources.title: Cell cycle-related kinase promotes immunosuppressive microenvironment in hepatocellular carcinoma
sources.note: The HCC immunology paper ties CCRK to IL-6 signaling and PMN-MDSC accumulation.

sources.title: The role of IL-6/STAT3 signaling in HCC
sources.note: Reviews and mechanistic studies describe IL6, STAT3, and inflammatory cytokine programs as key HCC signaling axes.
